58941.title: Non-Stop 80s Hits!
58941.description: We got hits... We got hits from the 80s. And guess what? They don't stop! You're welcome!

58942.title: Top 50 Classics That Made MTV!
58942.description: Back in the day, MTV was filling our screens with some iconic music videos, which is why we're playing 50 of the best classics that made MTV great!

58943.title: I Want My MTV 80s!
58943.description: We've gone back to the 80s here at MTV and we're saluting big hair, power suits and a decade of pure pop icons. It's non-stop nostalgia right here at MTV 80s!

58944.title: Forever 80s
58944.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

58945.title: 80s Power Ballad Heaven!
58945.description: We've selected some of the most iconic 80s power ballads ever recorded to play for you right now on MTV 80s!

58946.title: ... So 80s!
58946.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
